topbar.webSearchUnsupported: Current model is not marked as supporting web search (toggle it in model settings)
topbar.formattingPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Respond using Markdown tables for all answers
topbar.jsonModeHint: Adds response_format: json_object to the request; model must return valid JSON

model.title: Model Management
model.subtitle: Configure and manage llama-server instances
model.name: Name
model.webSearchHint: When enabled, a web-search toggle will appear in the chat top bar. Requires the model or a proxy layer to honour the web_search field.
model.multimodalHint: When enabled, an image-upload button appears in the chat input. Requires a vision model such as LLaVA / Qwen-VL / MiniCPM-V.

chat.startHint: Click "New Chat" on the left, or pick an existing conversation
chat.selectModelHint: Tip: select a model in the top bar and start its server from the Models page
chat.sendMessage: Send a message to start chatting
chat.serverNotRunning: Model "{{name}}" is not running. Go to the Models page to start it.
chat.disclaimer: AI may produce mistakes — verify important info
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
chat.requestFailedHint:
Please verify:
- The model server is running
- The API URL is correct ({{url}})
chat.editConfirmBody: Editing this message will clear all subsequent messages. Continue?
chat.multimodalUnsupported: Current model is not marked as multimodal

training.tbHint: Tip: run `tensorboard --logdir runs/` to start TensorBoard first
training.selectLogHint: Pick a log file and click Start watching

convert.title: Model format conversion
convert.subtitle: Convert a Hugging Face (PyTorch) model to GGUF
convert.outPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to save next to the model
convert.outTypeHint: f16 / bf16 / q8_0 — typically convert to f16 first, then use llama-quantize for further compression
convert.pythonNotFound: Python not found. Make sure it's installed and on PATH
convert.scriptNotFound: convert_hf_to_gguf.py not found. Provide a path or clone the llama.cpp repo.
convert.securityNote: ⚠️ Only convert models you trust. This tool only invokes the Python conversion script and does not execute arbitrary code.
convert.noSource: Please pick a model source first
convert.noScript: Please specify the convert_hf_to_gguf.py script path
convert.hfHint: Hugging Face mode: install transformers and huggingface_hub first (pip install transformers huggingface_hub)

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.subtitle: Chain AI nodes and tools into automated pipelines
workflow.name: Name
workflow.selectNode: Click a node to edit its properties
workflow.addNodeHint: Drag node types onto the canvas, or click to add
workflow.connectHint: Drag from a node's output port (right) to another node's input port (left) to connect; click an edge to delete it
workflow.routerBranchHint: Each route gets its own output port — connect from the port matching its handle. Unmatched input flows from the default port.
workflow.noNodeOutput: This node produced no output on the last run (or hasn't run yet)

validate.title: Can't run — fix these first:
validate.emptyGraph: Workflow is empty; add some nodes
validate.noOutput: No Output node — the result has nowhere to go
validate.llmNoModel: LLM node "{{node}}" has no model selected
validate.llmMissingModel: LLM node "{{node}}" references a model that no longer exists; pick another
validate.cycle: Nodes form a cycle, so execution order can't be determined
validate.noOutputReached: Run finished but no Output node was reached (possibly skipped by a router branch)
